verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a river whose streams make glad the city of our God. There is a river whose streams make glad the city of our God. So I will rejoice, I will rejoice, and be glad. Yes I will be rejoice, I will rejoice and be glad!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is a fountain full of grace that flows from Emmanuel's veins. There is a fountain so full of grace that flows from my Savior's veins. It came and it healed me It came and refreshed me It came and washed my sins away!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So I will rejoice, I will rejoice, and be glad. I will rejoice, I will rejoice, and be glad.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is a fountain full of grace that flows from Emmanuel's veins. Has anybody been cleansed in the fountain, that flows from Emmanuel's veins. It came, and it healed me, it came and refreshed my soul, it came and washed my sins away
